name: E2E infrastructure overhaul
description: Modernize E2E test infrastructure: migrate helper functions to Page Object Model classes, promote test project setup to Playwright fixtures, and replace all fixed waitForTimeout() calls with condition-based waits for deterministic test execution.

architecture.description: Architecture design – POM hierarchy, fixture composition, wait replacements, migration sequence

change_history.description: Architecture design – POM hierarchy, fixture composition, wait replacements, vertical-slice migration
Address architecture review findings – 15 items across regex, caching, scoping, missing designs, slice restructuring
